name: New Broker Onboarding
description: Nurture new brokers from first listing through activation

steps.name: Welcome Email
steps.subject: Claim Your Listing - Fast Approval Available
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I noticed your listing and wanted to reach out personally.

We specialize in fast approvals and competitive rates.

Best regards,
The LoanBud Team

steps.name: Day 3 Call Reminder
steps.note: Follow up on welcome email sent Day 0. Ask if they reviewed our offer and have questions.

steps.name: Day 7 SMS Check-in
steps.message: Hi {{first_name}}, just checking in on your listing application. Reply anytime — we're here to help!

steps.name: Day 14 Follow-up Email
steps.subject: Still here to help — next steps for your listing
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

It's been two weeks since we first connected. I wanted to make sure you have everything you need to move forward.

Reply to this email or give us a call — we'd love to help you get funded.

Best,
John

name: Re-engagement Flow
description: Win back inactive partners with a structured touchpoint series

steps.name: Re-engagement Email
steps.subject: We miss you — let's reconnect
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

We haven't heard from you in a while and wanted to reconnect.

We have some exciting new programs that might be a great fit for you.

Best,
LoanBud Team

steps.name: Day 5 Call Reminder
steps.note: Check if they opened the re-engagement email. Offer a quick intro call.

steps.name: Day 10 SMS
steps.message: Hi {{first_name}}, we have new loan programs with competitive rates. Interested? Reply YES and we'll be in touch.

name: Lender Partner Nurture
description: Keep lender partners engaged with periodic updates and check-ins

steps.name: Intro Email
steps.subject: Welcome to the LoanBud Partner Network
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for joining our partner network. We're excited to work with you.

As a partner you'll receive priority support and early access to new programs.

Let's connect soon.

Mike

steps.name: Day 7 Call Reminder
steps.note: Intro call to discuss partnership terms and first referral opportunity.

steps.name: Day 21 Update Email
steps.subject: Your first month as a LoanBud partner — here's what's new
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

It's been three weeks since you joined and we wanted to share some highlights.

New programs, updated rates, and exclusive referral bonuses are live. Check the portal for details.

Mike
